description.value: Aura moderate evocation; CL 10th; Weight 5 lbs.; Price 60,312 gp DESCRIPTION This weapon functions as a +2 warhammer in the hands of most users. Yet in the hands of a dwarf, the warhammer gains an additional +1 enhancement bonus (for a total enhancement bonus of +3) and gains the returning special ability. It can be hurled with a 30-foot range increment. When hurled, a dwarven thrower deals an extra 2d8 points of damage against creatures of the giant subtype or an extra 1d8 points of damage against any other target. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Special creator must be a dwarf of at least 10th level; Cost 30,312 gp
